_comment: VMSync Test Data - Full MDM Report Validation (Optimized)

_documentation.purpose: Test cases for VMSync validation with full MDM diagnostic report capture
_documentation.optimization: VMSync executes ONLY ONCE - all tests search the same MDMReport.txt file
process: 1. VMSync executes ONCE during test setup to capture COMPLETE MDM diagnostic report
2. Full HTML report saved to ExpectedResults/MDMReport.txt (plain text format)
3. ALL test cases search within the SAME MDMReport.txt file for their specific settings
4. Each test validates its searchTerm and expectedValue from the shared report
5. Pass if value matches, Fail if not found or mismatched - NO repeated VMSync execution
_documentation.validation: Tests validate policy presence anywhere in the shared MDM diagnostic report
_documentation.parallelExecution: Tests execute in 3 parallel batches (VMSync_Batch1, Batch2, Batch3)
_documentation.reportLocation: ExpectedResults/MDMReport.txt (plain text with header + HTML content)
_documentation.performance: Significant improvement: VMSync runs once instead of N times (N = number of test cases)
